2024-25 Detroit Mercy Titans Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 8-24 (4-16, 10th in Horizon MBB)

Coach: Mark Montgomery

PS/G: 67.1 (331st of 364)

PA/G: 75.9 (292nd of 364)

SRS: -13.46 (330th of 364)

SOS: -3.11 (203rd of 364)

ORtg: 97.6 (348th of 364)

DRtg: 110.4 (320th of 364)
